name: Salmon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. I prefer Red Salmon, but Pink is alright.
2. Pick out the dark skin, crush bones and mash the salmon.
3. Cut celery into 1-inch pieces.
4. Grate onions.
5. Mix mashed salmon, grated onions, and chopped celery in a medium bowl.
6. Add lemon juice, dill weed, Miracle Whip (or mayonnaise), salt, and pepper to taste.
7. Mix well all ingredients.
8. Chill the mixture thoroughly.
9. This salad is really good on croissants.
10. Yield approx. 2 1/2 cups
